_note: MODE color vocabulary. This is the brand's color scale — the set of values that theme.json can reference. Replace or extend with your own design system's scale. References in theme.json use dot notation: "gray.900", "indigo.600". Top-level strings ("white", "black") are referenced by name. Literal CSS values in theme.json also pass through if no scale entry matches.
_source: Tailwind CSS v3 gray + indigo scales. Default for zero-to-one deployments. Swap for Radix Colors, your brand scale, or any W3C-format token set.
